MRP configuration settings
--------------------------
Domain ID...................................255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255 (Default)
Domain name.................................
Port number, Primary........................1/3
Port number, Secondary......................1/4
Port oper state, Primary....................forwarding
Port oper state, Secondary..................blocked
Fixed backup port (manager only)............disabled
Mode (administrative setting)...............manager
Mode (real operating state).................manager
Recovery delay..............................500ms
Recovery delay supported....................200ms,500ms
Advanced mode (react on link change)........enabled
Manager priority............................32768
VLAN ID.....................................1
Operation...................................enabled

General operating states:
Configuration info..........................no error

Manager-related operating states:
Ring state..................................closed
Redundancy exists...........................yes
Ring open count.............................2
Last ring open change.......................2026-02-21 10:30:15
Round trip delay max........................1250
Round trip delay min........................625
Non-blocking client support.................enabled

Client-related operating states:
Blocked support.............................enabled
